text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: ...No way. Did I really just sigh?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Pretend you didn't hear that. I'll be back to
normal soon enough.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
The future number one would never get tired from
a little bit of racing. You know that.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Your job is to help me win, so just focus on that.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite her confident words, Daiwa Scarlet lets
out another small sigh soon after.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's probably working too hard. I might need to
rethink her race schedule.
